examples.no: binde seg til et politisk program
examples.en: commit oneself to a political program

examples.no: for å få stillingen måtte hun binde seg for to år
examples.en: to get the position, she had to commit herself for two years

examples.no: han vil ikke binde seg til noen ennå
examples.en: he does not want to commit to anyone yet

definitions.translation: to push oneself beyond one's limits

examples.no: spillerne binder seg når de vet de må score
examples.en: the players overexert themselves when they know they have to score
